title: Seven Footprints to Satan
writer: Abraham Merritt, Benjamin Christensen, Cornell Woolrich
actors: Thelma Todd, Creighton Hale, Sheldon Lewis
plot: A young man of society wants to make an expedition to Africa, but his fiancée asks him for help with one of her father's guests shortly before his planned departure. Her suspicions about that guest are serious: this man tries to s...
